report.quickConsultation: This is a small sumamry report to get you started. If you want more details, do a deep indepth report. Alternatively, I will be happy to provide voluntary consultance if you need one. Send me a whatsapp.
report.deepConsultation: I will be happy to provide one session of voluntary consultation in case you would like to talk to me. Send me a whatsapp message and we can schedule a time.
